2026-03-24T13:04:42.5701473Z {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_018YEfntNA8eb3gNzERJbG4y","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→/**\n     2→ * TextBufferSnapshot: Immutable view of a TextBuffer at a point in time.\n     3→ *\n     4→ * O(1) snapshot creation via root NodeId capture and arena sharing.\n     5→ * Implements the DocumentSnapshot interface from the anchor module so that\n     6→ * CRDT anchors can be created and resolved against buffer state.\n     7→ *\n     8→ * Lifecycle:\n     9→ * - Create via TextBuffer.snapshot()\n    10→ * - Call release() when done to enable epoch-based reclamation\n    11→ * - FinalizationRegistry warns if GC'd without release()\n    12→ * - Auto-release after maxAge (default 30s) prevents memory leaks\n    13→ */\n    14→\n    15→import type { DocumentSnapshot, FragmentVisitor, SeekResult } from \"../anchor/snapshot.js\";\n    16→import type {\n    17→  Anchor,\n    18→  OperationId as AnchorOperationId,\n    19→  Bias,\n    20→  InsertionFragment,\n    21→  Position,\n    22→} from \"../anchor/types.js\";\n    23→import type { Epoch } from \"../arena/index.js\";\n    24→import { Rope } from \"../rope/rope.js\";\n    25→import type { SumTree } from \"../sum-tree/index.js\";\n    26→import type { Fragment, FragmentSummary, VersionVector } from \"./types.js\";\n    27→\n    28→/** Default max age for snapshots before auto-release (30 seconds). */\n    29→const DEFAULT_MAX_AGE_MS = 30_000;\n    30→\n    31→/** Callback for when a snapshot is released. */\n    32→export type SnapshotReleaseCallback = (epoch: Epoch, wasAutoRelease: boolean) => void;\n    33→\n    34→/** Options for snapshot creation. */\n    35→export interface SnapshotOptions {\n    36→  /** Maximum age in milliseconds before auto-release. Set to 0 to disable. */\n    37→  maxAgeMs?: number;\n    38→  /** Callback when snapshot is released. */\n    39→  onRelease?: SnapshotReleaseCallback;\n    40→}\n    41→\n    42→/** Held value type for FinalizationRegistry. */\n    43→interface SnapshotRegistryHeld {\n    44→  epoch: Epoch;\n    45→  createdAt: number;\n    46→  onRelease: SnapshotReleaseCallback | null;\n    47→}\n    48→\n    49→// FinalizationRegistry for leak detection\n    50→const snapshotRegistry = new FinalizationRegistry<SnapshotRegistryHeld>((held) => {\n    51→  // Snapshot was GC'd without explicit release() - log warning\n    52→  const age = Date.now() - held.createdAt;\n    53→  console.warn(\n    54→    `[TextBufferSnapshot] Leaked snapshot from epoch ${held.epoch} ` +\n    55→      `was GC'd after ${age}ms without release(). ` +\n    56→      `Call snapshot.release() when done to enable memory reclamation.`,\n    57→  );\n    58→  // Still call the release callback so the epoch can be freed\n    59→  if (held.onRelease !== null) {\n    60→    held.onRelease(held.epoch, true);\n    61→  }\n    62→});\n    63→\n    64→/**\n    65→ * An immutable O(1) snapshot of the TextBuffer.\n    66→ *\n    67→ * Captures:\n    68→ * - Root NodeId of the fragment SumTree (O(1))\n    69→ * - Cloned VersionVector (O(replicas))\n    70→ * - Reference to the shared arena\n    71→ *\n    72→ * All read operations traverse the tree on-demand, seeing the frozen state.\n    73→ */\n    74→export class TextBufferSnapshot implements DocumentSnapshot {\n    75→  private readonly tree: SumTree<Fragment, FragmentSummary>;\n    76→  private readonly _version: VersionVector;\n    77→  private readonly _epoch: Epoch;\n    78→  private readonly createdAt: number;\n    79→  private readonly maxAgeMs: number;\n    80→  private readonly onRelease: SnapshotReleaseCallback | null;\n    81→  private autoReleaseTimer: ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null;\n    82→\n    83→  private _text: string | null;\n    84→  private _rope: Rope | null;\n    85→  private _released: boolean;\n    86→\n    87→  constructor(\n    88→    tree: SumTree<Fragment, FragmentSummary>,\n    89→    version: VersionVector,\n    90→    epoch: Epoch,\n    91→    options: SnapshotOptions = {},\n    92→  ) {\n    93→    this.tree = tree;\n    94→    this._version = version;\n    95→    this._epoch = epoch;\n    96→    this.createdAt = Date.now();\n    97→    this.maxAgeMs = options.maxAgeMs ?? DEFAULT_MAX_AGE_MS;\n    98→    this.onRelease = options.onRelease ?? null;\n    99→    this.autoReleaseTimer = null;\n   100→\n   101→    this._text = null;\n   102→    this._rope = null;\n   103→    this._released = false;\n   104→\n   105→    // Register for leak detection\n   106→    const registryHeld: SnapshotRegistryHeld = {\n   107→      epoch,\n   108→      createdAt: this.createdAt,\n   109→      onRelease: this.onRelease,\n   110→    };\n   111→    snapshotRegistry.register(this, registryHeld, this);\n   112→\n   113→    // Set up auto-release timer if maxAge > 0\n   114→    if (this.maxAgeMs > 0) {\n   115→      this.autoReleaseTimer = setTimeout(() => {\n   116→        if (!this._released) {\n   117→          console.warn(\n   118→            `[TextBufferSnapshot] Auto-releasing snapshot from epoch ${epoch} ` +\n   119→              `after ${this.maxAgeMs}ms. Consider calling release() explicitly.`,\n   120→          );\n   121→          this.release(true);\n   122→        }\n   123→      }, this.maxAgeMs);\n   124→    }\n   125→  }\n   126→\n   127→  /** The epoch at which this snapshot was created. */\n   128→  get epoch(): Epoch {\n   129→    return this._epoch;\n   130→  }\n   131→\n   132→  /** Version vector at the time of this snapshot. */\n   133→  get version(): VersionVector {\n   134→    return this._version;\n   135→  }\n   136→\n   137→  /** Whether this snapshot has been released. */\n   138→  get released(): boolean {\n   139→    return this._released;\n   140→  }\n   141→\n   142→  /** Age of this snapshot in milliseconds. */\n   143→  get age(): number {\n   144→    return Date.now() - this.createdAt;\n   145→  }\n   146→\n   147→  /** Total UTF-16 length of visible text. O(1) via summary. */\n   148→  get length(): number {\n   149→    this.checkReleased();\n   150→    return this.tree.summary().visibleLen;\n   151→  }\n   152→\n   153→  /** Number of lines in the document. */\n   154→  get lineCount(): number {\n   155→    this.checkReleased();\n   156→    const rope = this.getRope();\n   157→    return rope.lineCount;\n   158→  }\n   159→\n   160→  /**\n   161→   * Get the visible text content, or a slice of it.\n   162→   */\n   163→  getText(start?: number, end?: number): string {\n   164→    this.checkReleased();\n   165→    const text = this.getFullText();\n   166→    if (start !== undefined || end !== undefined) {\n   167→      const s = start ?? 0;\n   168→      const e = end ?? text.length;\n   169→      return text.slice(s, e);\n   170→    }\n   171→    return text;\n   172→  }\n   173→\n   174→  /**\n   175→   * Get a single line by 0-based line number.\n   176→   */\n   177→  getLine(line: number): string {\n   178→    this.checkReleased();\n   179→    return this.getRope().getLine(line);\n   180→  }\n   181→\n   182→  /**\n   183→   * Convert a line number (0-based) to the UTF-16 offset of the start of that line.\n   184→   */\n   185→  lineToOffset(line: number): number {\n   186→    this.checkReleased();\n   187→    return this.getRope().lineToOffset(line);\n   188→  }\n   189→\n   190→  /**\n   191→   * Convert a UTF-16 offset to {line, col} (both 0-based).\n   192→   */\n   193→  offsetToLineCol(offset: number): { line: number; col: number } {\n   194→    this.checkReleased();\n   195→    return this.getRope().offsetToLineCol(offset);\n   196→  }\n   197→\n   198→  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n   199→  // DocumentSnapshot interface for anchor resolution\n   200→  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n   201→\n   202→  /**\n   203→   * Seek to a fragment by insertion ID and offset.\n   204→   * O(n) scan through fragments (could be optimized with secondary index).\n   205→   */\n   206→  seekToInsertion(insertionId: AnchorOperationId, offset: number): SeekResult {\n   207→    this.checkReleased();\n   208→    let utf16Offset = 0;\n   209→\n   210→    for (const frag of this.fragments()) {\n   211→      // Check if this fragment matches the insertion ID\n   212→      if (\n   213→        frag.insertionId.replicaId === insertionId.replicaId &&\n   214→        frag.insertionId.counter === insertionId.localSeq\n   215→      ) {\n   216→        // Check if the offset falls within this fragment's insertion range\n   217→        const fragStart = frag.insertionOffset;\n   218→        const fragEnd = frag.insertionOffset + frag.length;\n   219→\n   220→        if (offset >= fragStart && offset < fragEnd) {\n   221→          const localOffset = offset - fragStart;\n   222→          const position = frag.visible ? utf16Offset + localOffset : utf16Offset;\n   223→\n   224→          return {\n   225→            found: true,\n   226→            fragment: this.toInsertionFragment(frag),\n   227→            position: { utf16Offset: position },\n   228→          };\n   229→        }\n   230→\n   231→        if (offset === fragEnd) {\n   232→          const position = frag.visible ? utf16Offset + frag.length : utf16Offset;\n   233→          return {\n   234→            found: true,\n   235→            fragment: this.toInsertionFragment(frag),\n   236→            position: { utf16Offset: position },\n   237→          };\n   238→        }\n   239→      }\n   240→\n   241→      if (frag.visible) {\n   242→        utf16Offset += frag.length;\n   243→      }\n   244→    }\n   245→\n   246→    return {\n   247→      found: false,\n   248→      fragment: null,\n   249→      position: { utf16Offset: 0 },\n   250→    };\n   251→  }\n   252→\n   253→  /**\n   254→   * Find the anchor at a given UTF-16 offset.\n   255→   */\n   256→  anchorAtOffset(utf16Offset: number, bias: Bias): Anchor {\n   257→    this.checkReleased();\n   258→    let currentOffset = 0;\n   259→    let lastVisibleFrag: Fragment | undefined;\n   260→\n   261→    for (const frag of this.fragments()) {\n   262→      if (!frag.visible) continue;\n   263→\n   264→      lastVisibleFrag = frag;\n   265→      const fragEnd = currentOffset + frag.length;\n   266→\n   267→      if (utf16Offset < fragEnd) {\n   268→        // Strictly inside this fragment\n   269→        const localOffset = utf16Offset - currentOffset;\n   270→        return {\n   271→          insertionId: {\n   272→            replicaId: frag.insertionId.replicaId,\n   273→            localSeq: frag.insertionId.counter,\n   274→          },\n   275→          offset: frag.insertionOffset + localOffset,\n   276→          bias,\n   277→        };\n   278→      }\n   279→\n   280→      if (utf16Offset === fragEnd) {\n   281→        // At exact boundary — with Left bias stay here, with Right bias go to next\n   282→        if (bias === 0) {\n   283→          // Left bias\n   284→          return {\n   285→            insertionId: {\n   286→              replicaId: frag.insertionId.replicaId,\n   287→              localSeq: frag.insertionId.counter,\n   288→            },\n   289→            offset: frag.insertionOffset + frag.length,\n   290→            bias,\n   291→          };\n   292→        }\n   293→        // Right bias: continue to next fragment\n   294→      }\n   295→\n   296→      currentOffset = fragEnd;\n   297→    }\n   298→\n   299→    // Past end of document\n   300→    if (lastVisibleFrag !== undefined) {\n   301→      return {\n   302→        insertionId: {\n   303→          replicaId: lastVisibleFrag.insertionId.replicaId,\n   304→          localSeq: lastVisibleFrag.insertionId.counter,\n   305→        },\n   306→        offset: lastVisibleFrag.insertionOffset + lastVisibleFrag.length,\n   307→        bias,\n   308→      };\n   309→    }\n   310→\n   311→    // Empty document\n   312→    return {\n   313→      insertionId: { replicaId: 0, localSeq: 0 },\n   314→      offset: 0,\n   315→      bias,\n   316→    };\n   317→  }\n   318→\n   319→  /**\n   320→   * Iterate over all fragments in document order.\n   321→   */\n   322→  visitFragments(visitor: FragmentVisitor): void {\n   323→    this.checkReleased();\n   324→    let utf16Offset = 0;\n   325→\n   326→    for (const frag of this.fragments()) {\n   327→      const insFrag = this.toInsertionFragment(frag);\n   328→      const position: Position = { utf16Offset };\n   329→      const shouldContinue = visitor(insFrag, position);\n   330→      if (!shouldContinue) break;\n   331→\n   332→      if (frag.visible) {\n   333→        utf16Offset += frag.length;\n   334→      }\n   335→    }\n   336→  }\n   337→\n   338→  /**\n   339→   * Resolve an Anchor to a UTF-16 offset in this snapshot.\n   340→   */\n   341→  resolveAnchor(anchor: Anchor): number {\n   342→    this.checkReleased();\n   343→    const result = this.seekToInsertion(anchor.insertionId, anchor.offset);\n   344→    if (result.found) {\n   345→      return result.position.utf16Offset;\n   346→    }\n   347→    // Sentinel anchors\n   348→    if (anchor.insertionId.replicaId === 0 && anchor.insertionId.localSeq === 0) {\n   349→      return 0;\n   350→    }\n   351→    return this.length;\n   352→  }\n   353→\n   354→  /**\n   355→   * Create an anchor at the given offset.\n   356→   */\n   357→  createAnchor(offset: number, bias = 0): Anchor {\n   358→    this.checkReleased();\n   359→    return this.anchorAtOffset(offset, bias as Bias);\n   360→  }\n   361→\n   362→  /**\n   363→   * Release this snapshot. After calling release(), the snapshot should not be used.\n   364→   * This enables epoch-based memory reclamation.\n   365→   */\n   366→  release(isAutoRelease = false): void {\n   367→    if (this._released) return;\n   368→\n   369→    this._released = true;\n   370→    this._text = null;\n   371→    this._rope = null;\n   372→\n   373→    // Cancel auto-release timer\n   374→    if (this.autoReleaseTimer !== null) {\n   375→      clearTimeout(this.autoReleaseTimer);\n   376→      this.autoReleaseTimer = null;\n   377→    }\n   378→\n   379→    // Unregister from FinalizationRegistry\n   380→    snapshotRegistry.unregister(this);\n   381→\n   382→    // Notify the buffer to release the epoch\n   383→    if (this.onRelease !== null) {\n   384→      this.onRelease(this._epoch, isAutoRelease);\n   385→    }\n   386→  }\n   387→\n   388→  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n   389→  // Iterators\n   390→  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n   391→\n   392→  /**\n   393→   * Iterate over lines in the document.\n   394→   *\n   395→   * @param startLine - Starting line number (0-based, inclusive). Defaults to 0.\n   396→   * @param endLine - Ending line number (0-based, exclusive). Defaults to lineCount.\n   397→   *\n   398→   * @example\n   399→   * ```ts\n   400→   * for (const line of snapshot.lines()) {\n   401→   *   console.log(line);\n   402→   * }\n   403→   *\n   404→   * // Iterate lines 5-10\n   405→   * for (const line of snapshot.lines(5, 10)) {\n   406→   *   console.log(line);\n   407→   * }\n   408→   * ```\n   409→   */\n   410→  *lines(startLine?: number, endLine?: number): IterableIterator<string> {\n   411→    yield* this.getRope().lines(startLine, endLine);\n   412→  }\n   413→\n   414→  /**\n   415→   * Iterate over raw text chunks in the document.\n   416→   *\n   417→   * Chunks are the internal storage units. This provides efficient\n   418→   * access to the underlying data without constructing the full string.\n   419→   *\n   420→   * @param start - Starting UTF-16 offset (inclusive). Defaults to 0.\n   421→   * @param end - Ending UTF-16 offset (exclusive). Defaults to length.\n   422→   *\n   423→   * @example\n   424→   * ```ts\n   425→   * for (const chunk of snapshot.chunks()) {\n   426→   *   process(chunk);\n   427→   * }\n   428→   * ```\n   429→   */\n   430→  *chunks(start?: number, end?: number): IterableIterator<string> {\n   431→    yield* this.getRope().chunks(start, end);\n   432→  }\n   433→\n   434→  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n   435→  // Internal helpers\n   436→  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n   437→\n   438→  /**\n   439→   * Iterate over fragments from the tree. Consider calling release() explicitly.`,\n          );\n          this.release(true);\n        }\n      }, this.maxAgeMs);\n    }\n  }\n\n  /** The epoch at which this snapshot was created. */\n  get epoch(): Epoch {\n    return this._epoch;\n  }\n\n  /** Version vector at the time of this snapshot. */\n  get version(): VersionVector {\n    return this._version;\n  }\n\n  /** Whether this snapshot has been released. */\n  get released(): boolean {\n    return this._released;\n  }\n\n  /** Age of this snapshot in milliseconds. */\n  get age(): number {\n    return Date.now() - this.createdAt;\n  }\n\n  /** Total UTF-16 length of visible text. ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n  /**\n   * Seek to a fragment by insertion ID and offset.\n   * O(n) scan through fragments (could be optimized with secondary index).\n   */\n  seekToInsertion(insertionId: AnchorOperationId, offset: number): SeekResult {\n    this.checkReleased();\n    let utf16Offset = 0;\n\n    for (const frag of this.fragments()) {\n      // Check if this fragment matches the insertion ID\n      if (\n        frag.insertionId.replicaId === insertionId.replicaId &&\n        frag.insertionId.counter === insertionId.localSeq\n      ) {\n        // Check if the offset falls within this fragment's insertion range\n        const fragStart = frag.insertionOffset;\n        const fragEnd = frag.insertionOffset + frag.length;\n\n        if (offset >= fragStart && offset < fragEnd) {\n          const localOffset = offset - fragStart;\n          const position = frag.visible ? utf16Offset this.toInsertionFragment(frag),\n            position: { utf16Offset: position },\n          };\n        }\n      }\n\n      if (frag.visible) {\n        utf16Offset += frag.length;\n      }\n    }\n\n    return {\n      found: false,\n      fragment: null,\n      position: { utf16Offset: 0 },\n    };\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Find the anchor at a given UTF-16 offset.\n   */\n  anchorAtOffset(utf16Offset: number, bias: Bias): Anchor {\n    this.checkReleased();\n    let currentOffset = 0;\n    let lastVisibleFrag: Fragment | undefined;\n\n    for (const frag of this.fragments()) {\n      if (!frag.visible) continue;\n\n      lastVisibleFrag = frag;\n      const fragEnd = currentOffset + frag.length;\n\n      if (utf16Offset < fragEnd) {\n        // Strictly frag.insertionId.counter,\n          },\n          offset: frag.insertionOffset + localOffset,\n          bias,\n        };\n      }\n\n      if (utf16Offset === fragEnd) {\n        // At exact boundary — with Left bias stay here, with Right bias go to next\n        if (bias === 0) {\n          // Left bias\n          return {\n            insertionId: {\n              replicaId: frag.insertionId.replicaId,\n              localSeq: frag.insertionId.counter,\n            },\n            offset: frag.insertionOffset + frag.length,\n            bias,\n          };\n        }\n        // Right bias: continue to next fragment\n      }\n\n      currentOffset = fragEnd;\n    }\n\n    // Past end of document\n    if (lastVisibleFrag !== undefined) {\n      return {\n        insertionId: {\n          replicaId: lastVisibleFrag.insertionId.replicaId,\n          localSeq: lastVisibleFrag.insertionId.counter,\n        },\n        offset: lastVisibleFrag.insertionOffset + lastVisibleFrag.length,\n        bias,\n      };\n    }\n\n    // Empty document\n    return {\n      insertionId: { replicaId: 0, localSeq: 0 },\n      offset: 0,\n      bias,\n    };\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Iterate over all fragments in document order.\n   */\n  visitFragments(visitor: FragmentVisitor): void {\n    this.checkReleased();\n    let utf16Offset = 0;\n\n    for (const frag of this.fragments()) {\n      const insFrag = this.toInsertionFragment(frag);\n      const position: Position = { utf16Offset };\n      const shouldContinue = visitor(insFrag, position);\n      if (!shouldContinue) break;\n\n      if (frag.visible) {\n        utf16Offset += frag.length;\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Resolve an Anchor to a UTF-16 offset in this snapshot.\n   */\n  resolveAnchor(anchor: Anchor): number {\n    this.checkReleased();\n    const result = this.seekToInsertion(anchor.insertionId, anchor.offset);\n    if (result.found) {\n      return result.position.utf16Offset;\n    }\n    // Sentinel anchors\n    if (anchor.insertionId.replicaId === 0 && anchor.insertionId.localSeq === 0) {\n      return 0;\n    }\n    return this.length;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Create an anchor at the given offset.\n   */\n  createAnchor(offset: number, bias = 0): Anchor {\n    this.checkReleased();\n    return this.anchorAtOffset(offset, bias as Bias);\n After calling release(), the snapshot should not be used.\n   * This enables epoch-based memory reclamation.\n   */\n  release(isAutoRelease = false): void {\n    if (this._released) return;\n\n    this._released = true;\n    this._text = null;\n    this._rope = null;\n\n    // Cancel auto-release timer\n    if (this.autoReleaseTimer !== null) {\n      clearTimeout(this.autoReleaseTimer);\n      this.autoReleaseTimer = null;\n    }\n\n    // Unregister from FinalizationRegistry\n    snapshotRegistry.unregister(this);\n\n    // Notify the buffer to release the epoch\n    if (this.onRelease !== null) {\n      this.onRelease(this._epoch, isAutoRelease);\n    }\n  }\n\n  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // Iterators\n  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n  /**\n   * Iterate over lines in the document.\n   *\n   * @param startLine - Starting line number (0-based, inclusive). Defaults to 0.\n   * @param endLine - Ending line number (0-based, exclusive). This provides efficient\n   * access to the underlying data without constructing the full string.\n   *\n   * @param start - Starting UTF-16 offset (inclusive). Defaults to 0.\n   * @param end - Ending UTF-16 offset (exclusive). Defaults to length.\n   *\n   * @example\n   * ```ts\n   * for (const chunk of snapshot.chunks()) {\n   *   process(chunk);\n   * }\n   * ```\n   */\n  *chunks(start?: number, end?: number): IterableIterator<string> {\n    yield* this.getRope().chunks(start, end);\n  }\n\n  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // Internal helpers\n  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n  /**\n   * Iterate over fragments from the tree. This is O(n) traversal.\n   */\n  private *fragments(): Generator<Fragment> {\n    for (const frag of this.tree.toArray()) {\n      yield frag;\n    }\n  }\n\n  private checkReleased(): void {\n    if (this._released) {\n      throw new Error(\"Cannot use released snapshot\");\n    }\n  }\n\n  private getFullText(): string {\n    if (this._text !== null) return this._text;\n    const parts: string[] = [];\n    for (const frag of this.fragments()) {\n      if (frag.visible) {\n        parts.push(frag.text);\n      }\n    }\n    this._text = parts.join(\"\");\n    return this._text;\n  }\n\n  private getRope(): Rope {\n    if (this._rope !== null) return this._rope;\n    this._rope = Rope.from(this.getFullText());\n    return this._rope;\n  }\n\n  private toInsertionFragment(frag: Fragment): InsertionFragment {\n    return {\n      insertionId: {\n        replicaId: frag.insertionId.replicaId,\n        localSeq: frag.insertionId.counter,\n      },\n      startOffset: frag.insertionOffset,\n      endOffset: frag.insertionOffset + frag.length,\n      isDeleted: !frag.visible,\n      utf16Len: frag.visible ? frag.length : 0,\n    };\n  }\n}\n","numLines":484,"startLine":1,"totalLines":484}}}
