  10→\n    11→// Default branching factor (fits 1 cache line for Uint32 summaries)\n    12→export const DEFAULT_BRANCHING_FACTOR = 16;\n    13→\n    14→/**\n    15→ * Summary trait: a monoid over item summaries.\n    16→ * Summaries must support an identity element and an associative combine operation.\n    17→ */\n    18→export interface Summary<S> {\n    19→  /** The identity element (empty summary) */\n    20→  identity(): S;\n    21→  /** Combine two summaries (must be associative) */\n    22→  combine(left: S, right: S): S;\n    23→}\n    24→\n    25→/**\n    26→ * Dimension trait: maps a summary to a comparable measure.\n    27→ * Used for seeking to positions in the tree.\n    28→ */\n    29→export interface Dimension<S, D> {\n    30→  /** Extract the dimension value from a summary */\n    31→  measure(summary: S): D;\n    32→  /** Compare two dimension values (returns negative if a < b, 0 if equal, positive if a > b) */\n    33→  compare(a: D, b: D): number;\n    34→  /** Add two dimension values */\n    35→  add(a: D, b: D): D;\n    36→  /** The zero value for this dimension */\n    37→  zero(): D;\n    38→}\n    39→\n    40→/**\n    41→ * Item trait: items stored in the tree must be summarizable.\n    42→ */\n    43→export interface Summarizable<S> {\n    44→  /** Compute the summary for this item */\n    45→  summary(): S;\n    46→}\n    47→\n    48→/**\n    49→ * Bias for cursor seeking: whether to land before or after the target.\n    50→ */\n    51→export type SeekBias = \"left\" | \"right\";\n    52→\n    53→/**\n    54→ * Position in a cursor stack: (nodeId, childIndex, accumulatedPosition)\n    55→ */\n    56→interface StackEntry<D> {\n    57→  nodeId: NodeId;\n    58→  childIndex: number;\n    59→  position: D;\n    60→}\n    61→\n    62→/**\n    63→ * Cursor for navigating the SumTree.\n    64→ * Maintains a stack of (nodeId, childIndex) pairs with accumulated position.\n    65→ */\n    66→export class Cursor<T extends Summarizable<S>, S, D> {\n    67→  private tree: SumTree<T, S>;\n    68→  private dimension: Dimension<S, D>;\n    69→  private stack: Array<StackEntry<D>>;\n    70→  private _position: D;\n    71→  private _atEnd: boolean;\n    72→\n    73→  constructor(tree: SumTree<T, S>, dimension: Dimension<S, D>) {\n    74→    this.tree = tree;\n    75→    this.dimension = dimension;\n    76→    this.stack = [];\n    77→    this._position = dimension.zero();\n    78→    this._atEnd = tree.isEmpty();\n    79→  }\n    80→\n    81→  /** Current position in the dimension */\n    82→  get position(): D {\n    83→    return this._position;\n    84→  }\n    85→\n    86→  /** Whether cursor is past the last item */\n    87→  get atEnd(): boolean {\n    88→    return this._atEnd;\n    89→  }\n    90→\n    91→  /** Reset cursor to the beginning */\n    92→  reset(): void {\n    93→    this.stack = [];\n    94→    this._position = this.dimension.zero();\n    95→    this._atEnd = this.tree.isEmpty();\n    96→\n    97→    if (!this._atEnd) {\n    98→      this.descendToLeftmost(this.tree.root);\n    99→    }\n   100→  }\n   101→\n   102→  /**\n   103→   * Seek forward to the given target position.\n   104→   * Returns true if an item was found at or near the target.\n   105→   */\n   106→  seekForward(target: D, bias: SeekBias = \"right\"): boolean {\n   107→    if (this._atEnd) {\n   108→      return false;\n   109→    }\n   110→\n   111→    if (this.stack.length === 0) {\n   112→      this.reset();\n   113→    }\n   114→\n   115→    // If we're already past the target, can't seek forward\n   116→    if (this.dimension.compare(this._position, target) > 0) {\n   117→      return true; // Already past it\n   118→    }\n   119→\n   120→    return this.seekFromCurrent(target, bias);\n   121→  }\n   122→\n   123→  /**\n   124→   * Move to the next item.\n   125→   * Returns false if already at end.\n   126→   */\n   127→  next(): boolean {\n   128→    if (this._atEnd) {\n   129→      return false;\n   130→    }\n   131→\n   132→    // Get current item summary and advance position\n   133→    const item = this.item();\n   134→    if (item !== undefined) {\n   135→      const itemSummary = item.summary();\n   136→      const itemMeasure = this.dimension.measure(itemSummary);\n   137→      this._position = this.dimension.add(this._position, itemMeasure);\n   138→    }\n   139→\n   140→    // Try to move to next sibling or ascend\n   141→    return this.advanceToNext();\n   142→  }\n   143→\n   144→  /**\n   145→   * Move to the previous item.\n   146→   * Returns false if already at beginning.\n   147→   */\n   148→  prev(): boolean {\n   149→    if (this.stack.length === 0) {\n   150→      return false;\n   151→    }\n   152→\n   153→    // Try to move to previous sibling\n   154→    const top = this.stack[this.stack.length - 1];\n   155→    if (top === undefined) {\n   156→      return false;\n   157→    }\n   158→\n   159→    if (top.childIndex > 0) {\n   160→      // Move to previous sibling\n   161→      top.childIndex--;\n   162→\n   163→      // If internal node, descend to rightmost leaf\n   164→      const arena = this.tree.getArena();\n   165→      if (arena.isInternal(top.nodeId)) {\n   166→        const childId = arena.getChild(top.nodeId, top.childIndex);\n   167→        if (childId !== INVALID_NODE_ID) {\n   168→          this.descendToRightmost(childId);\n   169→        }\n   170→      }\n   171→\n   172→      // Update position (subtract previous items)\n   173→      this.recalculatePosition();\n   174→      this._atEnd = false;\n   175→      return true;\n   176→    }\n   177→\n   178→    // Ascend to parent\n   179→    this.stack.pop();\n   180→    if (this.stack.length === 0) {\n   181→      // At beginning\n   182→      this.reset();\n   183→      return false;\n   184→    }\n   185→\n   186→    return this.prev();\n   187→  }\n   188→\n   189→  /**\n   190→   * Get the current item at cursor position.\n   191→   * Returns undefined if cursor is at end or at an internal node boundary.\n   192→   */\n   193→  item(): T | undefined {\n   194→    if (this._atEnd || this.stack.length === 0) {\n   195→      return undefined;\n   196→    }\n   197→\n   198→    const top = this.stack[this.stack.length - 1];\n   199→    if (top === undefined) {\n   200→      return undefined;\n   201→    }\n   202→\n   203→    const arena = this.tree.getArena();\n   204→    if (!arena.isLeaf(top.nodeId)) {\n   205→      return undefined;\n   206→    }\n   207→\n   208→    const leafItems = this.tree.getLeafItems(top.nodeId);\n   209→    return leafItems[top.childIndex];\n   210→  }\n   211→\n   212→  /**\n   213→   * Get the summary of remaining items from cursor to end.\n   214→   * Includes the current item.\n   215→   */\n   216→  suffix(): S {\n   217→    const summaryOps = this.tree.getSummaryOps();\n   218→    if (this._atEnd) {\n   219→      return summaryOps.identity();\n   220→    }\n   221→\n   222→    // Sum from current position to end.\n   223→    // Walk from the deepest stack entry (leaf) upward to root.\n   224→    // For leaf entries, sum items from childIndex onward.\n   225→    // For internal entries, find the child that was descended into\n   226→    // (identified by the next deeper entry's nodeId) and sum children\n   227→    // strictly AFTER that child. This avoids double-counting the subtree\n   228→    // already accounted for by the deeper stack entry.\n   229→    let result = summaryOps.identity();\n   230→    const arena = this.tree.getArena();\n   231→\n   232→    for (let i = this.stack.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {\n   233→      const entry = this.stack[i];\n   234→      if (entry === undefined) continue;\n   235→\n   236→      const count = arena.getCount(entry.nodeId);\n   237→\n   238→      if (arena.isLeaf(entry.nodeId)) {\n   239→        // Leaf: sum items from childIndex (current item) onward\n   240→        const leafItems = this.tree.getLeafItems(entry.nodeId);\n   241→        for (let j = entry.childIndex; j < count; j++) {\n   242→          const item = leafItems[j];\n   243→          if (item !== undefined) {\n   244→            result = summaryOps.combine(result, item.summary());\n   245→          }\n   246→        }\n   247→      } else {\n   248→        // Internal node: find which child the deeper entry descended into,\n   249→        // then sum only the children AFTER it.\n   250→        const deeperEntry = this.stack[i + 1];\n   251→        let startJ = entry.childIndex;\n   252→\n   253→        if (deeperEntry !== undefined) {\n   254→          // Find the child index that matches the deeper entry's nodeId\n   255→          for (let j = 0; j < count; j++) {\n   256→            if (arena.getChild(entry.nodeId, j) === deeperEntry.nodeId) {\n   257→              startJ = j + 1;\n   258→              break;\n   259→            }\n   260→          }\n   261→        }\n   262→\n   263→        for (let j = startJ; j < count; j++) {\n   264→          const childId = arena.getChild(entry.nodeId, j);\n   265→          if (childId !== INVALID_NODE_ID) {\n   266→            const childSummary = this.tree.getSummary(childId);\n   267→            if (childSummary !== undefined) {\n   268→              result = summaryOps.combine(result, childSummary);\n   269→            }\n   270→          }\n   271→        }\n   272→      }\n   273→    }\n   274→\n   275→    return result;\n   276→  }\n   277→\n   278→  private seekFromCurrent(target: D, bias: SeekBias): boolean {\n   279→    const arena = this.tree.getArena();\n   280→\n   281→    // Navigate through the tree to find the target\n   282→    while (this.stack.length > 0) {\n   283→      const top = this.stack[this.stack.length - 1];\n   284→      if (top === undefined) break;\n   285→\n   286→      if (arena.isLeaf(top.nodeId)) {\n   287→        // At a leaf, scan items\n   288→        return this.scanLeaf(top, target, bias);\n   289→      }\n   290→\n   291→      // At internal node, find the right child\n   292→      const found = this.findChildForTarget(top, target, bias);\n   293→      if (!found) {\n   294→        // Need to ascend\n   295→        if (!this.ascendAndContinue(target, bias)) {\n   296→          this._atEnd = true;\n   297→          return false;\n   298→        }\n   299→      }\n   300→    }\n   301→\n   302→    return !this._atEnd;\n   303→  }\n   304→\n   305→  private scanLeaf(entry: StackEntry<D>, target: D, bias: SeekBias): boolean {\n   306→    const leafItems = this.tree.getLeafItems(entry.nodeId);\n   307→    const arena = this.tree.getArena();\n   308→    const count = arena.getCount(entry.nodeId);\n   309→\n   310→    let pos = entry.position;\n   311→\n   312→    for (let i = entry.childIndex; i < count; i++) {\n   313→      const item = leafItems[i];\n   314→      if (item === undefined) continue;\n   315→\n   316→      const itemSummary = item.summary();\n   317→      const itemMeasure = this.dimension.measure(itemSummary);\n   318→      const nextPos = this.dimension.add(pos, itemMeasure);\n   319→\n   320→      const cmp = this.dimension.compare(nextPos, target);\n   321→\n   322→      if (cmp > 0 || (cmp === 0 && bias === \"left\")) {\n   323→        // Found it\n   324→        entry.childIndex = i;\n   325→        entry.position = pos;\n   326→        this._position = pos;\n   327→        return true;\n   328→      }\n   329→\n   330→      pos = nextPos;\n   331→    }\n   332→\n   333→    // Target is past this leaf\n   334→    this._position = pos;\n   335→    entry.childIndex = count;\n   336→    return this.ascendAndContinue(target, bias);\n   337→  }\n   338→\n   339→  private findChildForTarget(entry: StackEntry<D>, target: D, bias: SeekBias): boolean {\n   340→    const arena = this.tree.getArena();\n   341→    const count = arena.getCount(entry.nodeId);\n   342→\n   343→    let pos = entry.position;\n   344→\n   345→    for (let i = entry.childIndex; i < count; i++) {\n   346→      const childId = arena.getChild(entry.nodeId, i);\n   347→      if (childId === INVALID_NODE_ID) continue;\n   348→\n   349→      const childSummary = this.tree.getSummary(childId);\n   350→      if (childSummary === undefined) continue;\n   351→\n   352→      const childMeasure = this.dimension.measure(childSummary);\n   353→      const nextPos = this.dimension.add(pos, childMeasure);\n   354→\n   355→      const cmp = this.dimension.compare(nextPos, target);\n   356→\n   357→      if (cmp > 0 || (cmp === 0 && bias === \"left\")) {\n   358→        // Target is in this child\n   359→        entry.childIndex = i + 1; // Mark we've processed up to here\n   360→        this.stack.push({\n   361→          nodeId: childId,\n   362→          childIndex: 0,\n   363→          position: pos,\n   364→        });\n   365→        return true;\n   366→      }\n   367→\n   368→      pos = nextPos;\n   369→    }\n   370→\n   371→    // Target is past all children\n   372→    entry.position = pos;\n   373→    entry.childIndex = count;\n   374→    return false;\n   375→  }\n   376→\n   377→  private ascendAndContinue(target: D, bias: SeekBias): boolean {\n   378→    this.stack.pop();\n   379→    if (this.stack.length === 0) {\n   380→      this._atEnd = true;\n   381→      return false;\n   382→    }\n   383→    return this.seekFromCurrent(target, bias);\n   384→  }\n   385→\n   386→  private advanceToNext(): boolean {\n   387→    if (this.stack.length === 0) {\n   388→      this._atEnd = true;\n   389→      return false;\n   390→    }\n   391→\n   392→    const arena = this.tree.getArena();\n   393→    const top = this.stack[this.stack.length - 1];\n   394→    if (top === undefined) {\n   395→      this._atEnd = true;\n   396→      return false;\n   397→    }\n   398→\n   399→    const count = arena.getCount(top.nodeId);\n   400→\n   401→    // Try to move to next sibling\n   402→    if (top.childIndex + 1 < count) {\n   403→      top.childIndex++;\n   404→\n   405→      if (arena.isInternal(top.nodeId)) {\n   406→        const childId = arena.getChild(top.nodeId, top.childIndex);\n   407→        if (childId !== INVALID_NODE_ID) {\n   408→          this.descendToLeftmost(childId);\n   409→        }\n   410→      }\n   411→      return true;\n   412→    }\n   413→\n   414→    // Ascend to parent and try again\n   415→    this.stack.pop();\n   416→    return this.advanceToNext();\n   417→  }\n   418→\n   419→  private descendToLeftmost(nodeId: NodeId): void {\n   420→    const arena = this.tree.getArena();\n   421→    let current = nodeId;\n   422→    const pos = this._position;\n   423→\n   424→    while (arena.isInternal(current)) {\n   425→      this.stack.push({\n   426→        nodeId: current,\n   427→        childIndex: 0,\n   428→        position: pos,\n   429→      });\n   430→      const firstChild = arena.getChild(current, 0);\n   431→      if (firstChild === INVALID_NODE_ID) break;\n   432→      current = firstChild;\n   433→    }\n   434→\n   435→    // Push the leaf\n   436→    this.stack.push({\n   437→      nodeId: current,\n   438→      childIndex: 0,\n   439→      position: pos,\n   440→    });\n   441→  }\n   442→\n   443→  private descendToRightmost(nodeId: NodeId): void {\n   444→    const arena = this.tree.getArena();\n   445→    let current = nodeId;\n   446→\n   447→    while (arena.isInternal(current)) {\n   448→      const count = arena.getCount(current);\n   449→      const lastIndex = Math.max(0, count - 1);\n   450→      this.stack.push({\n   451→        nodeId: current,\n   452→        childIndex: lastIndex,\n   453→        position: this._position, // Will be recalculated\n   454→      });\n   455→      const lastChild = arena.getChild(current, lastIndex);\n   456→      if (lastChild === INVALID_NODE_ID) break;\n   457→      current = lastChild;\n   458→    }\n   459→\n   460→    // Push the leaf\n   461→    const leafCount = arena.getCount(current);\n   462→    this.stack.push({\n   463→      nodeId: current,\n   464→      childIndex: Math.max(0, leafCount - 1),\n   465→      position: this._position,\n   466→    });\n   467→  }\n   468→\n   469→  private recalculatePosition(): void {\n   470→    // Recalculate position by summing from root\n   471→    this._position = this.dimension.zero();\n   472→    const arena = this.tree.getArena();\n   473→\n   474→    for (let i = 0; i < this.stack.length; i++) {\n   475→      const entry = this.stack[i];\n   476→      if (entry === undefined) continue;\n   477→\n   478→      entry.position = this._position;\n   479→\n   480→      // Sum all siblings before current index\n   481→      for (let j = 0; j < entry.childIndex; j++) {\n   482→        if (arena.isLeaf(entry.nodeId)) {\n   483→          const leafItems = this.tree.getLeafItems(entry.nodeId);\n   484→          const item = leafItems[j];\n   485→          if (item !== undefined) {\n   486→            const itemMeasure = this.dimension.measure(item.summary());\n   487→            this._position = this.dimension.add(this._position, itemMeasure);\n   488→          }\n   489→        } else {\n   490→          const childId = arena.getChild(entry.nodeId, j);\n   491→          if (childId !== INVALID_NODE_ID) {\n   492→            const childSummary = this.tree.getSummary(childId);\n   493→            if (childSummary !== undefined) {\n   494→              const childMeasure = this.dimension.measure(childSummary);\n   495→              this._position = this.dimension.add(this._position, childMeasure);\n   496→            }\n   497→          }\n   498→        }\n   499→      }\n   500→    }\n   501→  }\n   502→}\n   503→\n   504→/**\n   505→ * Internal node data stored separately (for items array in leaves).\n   506→ */\n   507→interface LeafData<T> {\n   508→  items: T[];\n   509→}\n   510→\n   511→/**\n   512→ * SumTree: a balanced B-tree with monoidal summary caching.\n   513→ *\n   514→ * Generic parameters:\n   515→ * - T: item type (must implement Summarizable<S>)\n   516→ * - S: summary type\n   517→ */\n   518→export class SumTree<T extends Summarizable<S>, S> {\n   519→  private arena: Arena<LeafData<T>>;\n   520→  private summaries: Map<NodeId, S>;\n   521→  private _root: NodeId;\n   522→  private summaryOps: Summary<S>;\n   523→  private branchingFactor: number;\n   524→\n   525→  constructor(summaryOps: Summary<S>, branchingFactor = DEFAULT_BRANCHING_FACTOR) {\n   526→    this.arena = new Arena<LeafData<T>>();\n   527→    this.summaries = new Map();\n   528→    this.summaryOps = summaryOps;\n   529→    this.branchingFactor = branchingFactor;\n   530→\n   531→    // Create empty root leaf\n   532→    this._root = this.createLeaf([]);\n   533→  }\n   534→\n   535→  /** Get the root node ID */\n   536→  get root(): NodeId {\n   537→    return this._root;\n   538→  }\n   539→\n   540→  /** Check if tree is empty */\n   541→  isEmpty(): boolean {\n   542→    return this.arena.getCount(this._root) === 0;\n   543→  }\n   544→\n   545→  /** Get the total summary of the tree */\n   546→  summary(): S {\n   547→    const s = this.summaries.get(this._root);\n   548→    return s ?? this.summaryOps.identity();\n   549→  }\n   550→\n   551→  /** Get summary ops for external use */\n   552→  getSummaryOps(): Summary<S> {\n   553→    return this.summaryOps;\n   554→  }\n   555→\n   556→  /** Get arena for cursor use */\n   557→  getArena(): Arena<LeafData<T>> {\n   558→    return this.arena;\n   559→  }\n   560→\n   561→  /** Get summary of a specific node */\n   562→  getSummary(nodeId: NodeId): S | undefined {\n   563→    return this.summaries.get(nodeId);\n   564→  }\n   565→\n   566→  /** Get leaf items for cursor use */\n   567→  getLeafItems(nodeId: NodeId): T[] {\n   568→    const data = this.arena.getItem(nodeId);\n   569→    return data?.items ?? [];\n   570→  }\n   571→\n   572→  /**\n   573→   * Create a cursor for navigating the tree in the given dimension.\n   574→   */\n   575→  cursor<D>(dimension: Dimension<S, D>): Cursor<T, S, D> {\n   576→    const c = new Cursor<T, S, D>(this, dimension);\n   577→    c.reset();\n   578→    return c;\n   579→  }\n   580→\n   581→  /**\n   582→   * Push an item to the end of the tree.\n   583→   * Returns a new tree (path copying), leaving the original unchanged.\n   584→   */\n   585→  push(item: T): SumTree<T, S> {\n   586→    return this.insertAt(this.length(), item);\n   587→  }\n   588→\n   589→  /**\n   590→   * Insert an item at the given index.\n   591→   * Returns a new tree (path copying), leaving the original unchanged.\n   592→   */\n   593→  insertAt(index: number, item: T): SumTree<T, S> {\n   594→    const newTree = this.shallowClone();\n   595→\n   596→    // Find the leaf and position for insertion\n   597→    const path = newTree.findLeafForIndex(index);\n   598→    if (path.length === 0) {\n   599→      // Empty tree, insert into root\n   600→      const items = [item];\n   601→      newTree._root = newTree.createLeaf(items);\n   602→      return newTree;\n   603→    }\n   604→\n   605→    // Clone the path (path copying)\n   606→    const clonedPath = newTree.clonePath(path);\n   607→\n   608→    // Insert into the leaf\n   609→    const leafEntry = clonedPath[clonedPath.length - 1];\n   610→    if (leafEntry === undefined) {\n   611→      return newTree;\n   612→    }\n   613→\n   614→    const leafData = newTree.arena.getItem(leafEntry.nodeId);\n   615→    const items = leafData?.items ?? [];\n   616→    items.splice(leafEntry.indexInNode, 0, item);\n   617→\n   618→    // Update leaf\n   619→    newTree.arena.setItem(leafEntry.nodeId, { items });\n   620→    newTree.arena.setCount(leafEntry.nodeId, items.length);\n   621→\n   622→    // Check for overflow and split if needed\n   623→    if (items.length > newTree.branchingFactor) {\n   624→      newTree.splitAndPropagate(clonedPath);\n   625→    } else {\n   626→      // Just update summaries up the path\n   627→      newTree.updateSummariesUp(clonedPath);\n   628→    }\n   629→\n   630→    return newTree;\n   631→  }\n   632→\n   633→  /**\n   634→   * Remove item at the given index.\n   635→   * Returns a new tree (path copying), leaving the original unchanged.\n   636→   */\n   637→  removeAt(index: number): SumTree<T, S> {\n   638→    if (index < 0 || index >= this.length()) {\n   639→      throw new Error(`Index ${index} out of bounds`);\n   640→    }\n   641→\n   642→    const newTree = this.shallowClone();\n   643→    const path = newTree.findLeafForIndex(index);\n   644→    if (path.length === 0) {\n   645→      return newTree;\n   646→    }\n   647→\n   648→    // Clone the path\n   649→    const clonedPath = newTree.clonePath(path);\n   650→\n   651→    // Remove from the leaf\n   652→    const leafEntry = clonedPath[clonedPath.length - 1];\n   653→    if (leafEntry === undefined) {\n   654→      return newTree;\n   655→    }\n   656→\n   657→    const leafData = newTree.arena.getItem(leafEntry.nodeId);\n   658→    const items = leafData?.items ?? [];\n   659→    items.splice(leafEntry.indexInNode, 1);\n   660→\n   661→    // Update leaf\n   662→    newTree.arena.setItem(leafEntry.nodeId, { items });\n   663→    newTree.arena.setCount(leafEntry.nodeId, items.length);\n   664→\n   665→    // Check for underflow and merge if needed\n   666→    const minItems = Math.floor(newTree.branchingFactor / 2);\n   667→    if (items.length < minItems && clonedPath.length > 1) {\n   668→      newTree.mergeOrRedistribute(clonedPath);\n   669→    } else {\n   670→      newTree.updateSummariesUp(clonedPath);\n   671→    }\n   672→\n   673→    return newTree;\n   674→  }\n   675→\n   676→  /**\n   677→   * Get item at index.\n   678→   */\n   679→  get(index: number): T | undefined {\n   680→    if (index < 0 || index >= this.length()) {\n   681→      return undefined;\n   682→    }\n   683→\n   684→    const path = this.findLeafForIndex(index);\n   685→    const leafEntry = path[path.length - 1];\n   686→    if (leafEntry === undefined) {\n   687→      return undefined;\n   688→    }\n   689→\n   690→    const leafData = this.arena.getItem(leafEntry.nodeId);\n   691→    return leafData?.items[leafEntry.indexInNode];\n   692→  }\n   693→\n   694→  /**\n   695→   * Get the number of items in the tree.\n   696→   */\n   697→  length(): number {\n   698→    return this.countItems(this._root);\n   699→  }\n   700→\n   701→  /**\n   702→   * Split the tree at position, returning [left, right] trees.\n   703→   * Both trees are new (original unchanged via path copying).\n   704→   */\n   705→  slice(position: number): [SumTree<T, S>, SumTree<T, S>] {\n   706→    const len = this.length();\n   707→    if (position <= 0) {\n   708→      return [new SumTree<T, S>(this.summaryOps, this.branchingFactor), this.shallowClone()];\n   709→    }\n   710→    if (position >= len) {\n   711→      return [this.shallowClone(), new SumTree<T, S>(this.summaryOps, this.branchingFactor)];\n   712→    }\n   713→\n   714→    // Build left and right trees by collecting items\n   715→    const leftItems: T[] = [];\n   716→    const rightItems: T[] = [];\n   717→\n   718→    this.forEach((item, idx) => {\n   719→      if (idx < position) {\n   720→        leftItems.push(item);\n   721→      } else {\n   722→        rightItems.push(item);\n   723→      }\n   724→    });\n   725→\n   726→    return [\n   727→      SumTree.fromItems(leftItems, this.summaryOps, this.branchingFactor),\n   728→      SumTree.fromItems(rightItems, this.summaryOps, this.branchingFactor),\n   729→    ];\n   730→  }\n   731→\n   732→  /**\n   733→   * Concatenate two trees, returning a new tree.\n   734→   * Both input trees are unchanged (path copying).\n   735→   */\n   736→  static concat<T extends Summarizable<S>, S>(\n   737→    left: SumTree<T, S>,\n   738→    right: SumTree<T, S>,\n   739→  ): SumTree<T, S> {\n   740→    // Collect all items from both trees\n   741→    const items: T[] = [...left.toArray(), ...right.toArray()];\n   742→    return SumTree.fromItems(items, left.summaryOps, left.branchingFactor);\n   743→  }\n   744→\n   745→  /**\n   746→   * Create a tree from an array of items.\n   747→   */\n   748→  static fromItems<T extends Summarizable<S>, S>(\n   749→    items: T[],\n   750→    summaryOps: Summary<S>,\n   751→    branchingFactor = DEFAULT_BRANCHING_FACTOR,\n   752→  ): SumTree<T, S> {\n   753→    const tree = new SumTree<T, S>(summaryOps, branchingFactor);\n   754→\n   755→    if (items.length === 0) {\n   756→      return tree;\n   757→    }\n   758→\n   759→    // Build bottom-up for efficiency\n   760→    const leaves: NodeId[] = [];\n   761→    const minItems = Math.floor(branchingFactor / 2);\n   762→\n   763→    // Calculate how to split items into leaves\n   764→    const numFullLeaves = Math.floor(items.length / branchingFactor);\n   765→    const remainder = items.length % branchingFactor;\n   766→\n   767→    // If remainder would create an underflow leaf, redistribute\n   768→    if (remainder > 0 && remainder < minItems && numFullLeaves > 0) {\n   769→      // Take items from the last full leaf to balance\n   770→      // Split the last (branchingFactor + remainder) items into 2 leaves\n   771→      const lastTwoItemCount = branchingFactor + remainder;\n   772→      const firstHalf = Math.ceil(lastTwoItemCount / 2);\n   773→\n   774→      // Create all but last leaf normally\n   775→      for (let i = 0; i < (numFullLeaves - 1) * branchingFactor; i += branchingFactor) {\n   776→        const chunk = items.slice(i, i + branchingFactor);\n   777→        const leafId = tree.createLeaf(chunk);\n   778→        leaves.push(leafId);\n   779→      }\n   780→\n   781→      // Split the last batch into two leaves\n   782→      const startIdx = (numFullLeaves - 1) * branchingFactor;\n   783→      const chunk1 = items.slice(startIdx, startIdx + firstHalf);\n   784→      const chunk2 = items.slice(startIdx + firstHalf);\n   785→      leaves.push(tree.createLeaf(chunk1));\n   786→      leaves.push(tree.createLeaf(chunk2));\n   787→    } else {\n   788→      // Normal case: create leaves in chunks\n   789→      for (let i = 0; i < items.length; i += branchingFactor) {\n   790→        const chunk = items.slice(i, i + branchingFactor);\n   791→        const leafId = tree.createLeaf(chunk);\n   792→        leaves.push(leafId);\n   793→      }\n   794→    }\n   795→\n   796→    tree._root = tree.buildFromLeaves(leaves);\n   797→    return tree;\n   798→  }\n   799→\n   800→  /**\n   801→   * Iterate over all items in order.\n   802→   */\n   803→  forEach(callback: (item: T, index: number) => void): void {\n   804→    let index = 0;\n   805→    this.forEachNode(this._root, (item) => {\n   806→      callback(item, index++);\n   807→    });\n   808→  }\n   809→\n   810→  /**\n   811→   * Convert tree to array.\n   812→   */\n   813→  toArray(): T[] {\n   814→    const result: T[] = [];\n   815→    this.collectItems(this._root, result);\n   816→    return result;\n   817→  }\n   818→\n   819→  private collectItems(nodeId: NodeId, result: T[]): void {\n   820→    if (this.arena.isLeaf(nodeId)) {\n   821→      const data = this.arena.getItem(nodeId);\n   822→      if (data) {\n   823→        for (const item of data.items) {\n   824→          result.push(item);\n   825→        }\n   826→      }\n   827→      return;\n   828→    }\n   829→\n   830→    const children = this.arena.getChildren(nodeId);\n   831→    for (const childId of children) {\n   832→      this.collectItems(childId, result);\n   833→    }\n   834→  }\n   835→\n   836→  /**\n   837→   * Check tree invariants (for testing).\n   838→   */\n   839→  checkInvariants(): { valid: boolean; errors: string[] } {\n   840→    const errors: string[] = [];\n   841→\n   842→    // Check 1: All leaves at same depth\n   843→    const depths = new Set<number>();\n   844→    this.collectLeafDepths(this._root, 0, depths);\n   845→    if (depths.size > 1) {\n   846→      errors.push(`Leaves at different depths: ${[...depths].join(\", \")}`);\n   847→    }\n   848→\n   849→    // Check 2: Parent summary = monoidal sum of children\n   850→    this.checkSummaryInvariants(this._root, errors);\n   851→\n   852→    // Check 3: Node counts within bounds (except root)\n   853→    this.checkCountInvariants(this._root, true, errors);\n   854→\n   855→    return { valid: errors.length === 0, errors };\n   856→  }\n   857→\n   858→  // === Private methods ===\n   859→\n   860→  private createLeaf(items: T[]): NodeId {\n   861→    const id = this.arena.allocate();\n   862���    this.arena.setLeaf(id, items.length);\n   863→    this.arena.setItem(id, { items });\n   864→    this.arena.setHeight(id, 0);\n   865→\n   866→    // Compute summary\n   867→    let summary = this.summaryOps.identity();\n   868→    for (const item of items) {\n   869→      summary = this.summaryOps.combine(summary, item.summary());\n   870→    }\n   871→    this.summaries.set(id, summary);\n   872→\n   873→    return id;\n   874→  }\n   875→\n   876→  private createInternal(children: NodeId[]): NodeId {\n   877→    const id = this.arena.allocate();\n   878→    this.arena.setInternal(id, children.length, children);\n   879→\n   880→    // Height is max child height + 1\n   881→    let maxHeight = 0;\n   882→    for (const childId of children) {\n   883→      maxHeight = Math.max(maxHeight, this.arena.getHeight(childId));\n   884→    }\n   885→    this.arena.setHeight(id, maxHeight + 1);\n   886→\n   887→    // Compute summary\n   888→    let summary = this.summaryOps.identity();\n   889→    for (const childId of children) {\n   890→      const childSummary = this.summaries.get(childId);\n   891→      if (childSummary !== undefined) {\n   892→        summary = this.summaryOps.combine(summary, childSummary);\n   893→      }\n   894→    }\n   895→    this.summaries.set(id, summary);\n   896→\n   897→    return id;\n   898→  }\n   899→\n   900→  private countItems(nodeId: NodeId): number {\n   901→    if (this.arena.isLeaf(nodeId)) {\n   902→      return this.arena.getCount(nodeId);\n   903→    }\n   904→\n   905→    let count = 0;\n   906→    const children = this.arena.getChildren(nodeId);\n   907→    for (const childId of children) {\n   908→      count += this.countItems(childId);\n   909→    }\n   910→    return count;\n   911→  }\n   912→\n   913→  private forEachNode(nodeId: NodeId, callback: (item: T) => void): void {\n   914→    if (this.arena.isLeaf(nodeId)) {\n   915→      const data = this.arena.getItem(nodeId);\n   916→      if (data) {\n   917→        for (const item of data.items) {\n   918→          callback(item);\n   919→        }\n   920→      }\n   921→      return;\n   922→    }\n   923→\n   924→    const children = this.arena.getChildren(nodeId);\n   925→    for (const childId of children) {\n   926→      this.forEachNode(childId, callback);\n   927→    }\n   928→  }\n   929→\n   930→  /**\n   931→   * Create a shallow clone of this tree for O(1) snapshot creation.\n   932→   * The clone shares the arena with the original (immutable view via path copying).\n   933→   * This is O(1) as it only copies the root NodeId and creates a new summaries Map.\n   934→   */\n   935→  snapshotClone(): SumTree<T, S> {\n   936→    return this.shallowClone();\n   937→  }\n   938→\n   939→  private shallowClone(): SumTree<T, S> {\n   940→    const newTree = new SumTree<T, S>(this.summaryOps, this.branchingFactor);\n   941→    newTree.arena = this.arena; // Share arena (immutable view via path copying)\n   942→    newTree.summaries = new Map(this.summaries);\n   943→    newTree._root = this._root;\n   944→    return newTree;\n   945→  }\n   946→\n   947→  private findLeafForIndex(index: number): Array<{ nodeId: NodeId; indexInNode: number }> {\n   948→    const path: Array<{ nodeId: NodeId; indexInNode: number }> = [];\n   949→    let remaining = index;\n   950→    let current = this._root;\n   951→\n   952→    while (true) {\n   953→      if (this.arena.isLeaf(current)) {\n   954→        const count = this.arena.getCount(current);\n   955→        path.push({\n   956→          nodeId: current,\n   957→          indexInNode: Math.min(remaining, count),\n   958→        });\n   959→        break;\n   960→      }\n   961→\n   962→      const children = this.arena.getChildren(current);\n   963→      let found = false;\n   964→\n   965→      for (let i = 0; i < children.length; i++) {\n   966→        const childId = children[i];\n   967→        if (childId === undefined) continue;\n   968→\n   969→        const childCount = this.countItems(childId);\n   970→\n   971→        if (remaining < childCount || i === children.length - 1) {\n   972→          path.push({ nodeId: current, indexInNode: i });\n   973→          current = childId;\n   974→          found = true;\n   975→          break;\n   976→        }\n   977→\n   978→        remaining -= childCount;\n   979→      }\n   980→\n   981→      if (!found) break;\n   982→    }\n   983→\n   984→    return path;\n   985→  }\n   986→\n   987→  private clonePath(\n   988→    path: Array<{ nodeId: NodeId; indexInNode: number }>,\n   989→  ): Array<{ nodeId: NodeId; indexInNode: number }> {\n   990→    const clonedPath: Array<{ nodeId: NodeId; indexInNode: number }> = [];\n   991→    let prevClonedId: NodeId = INVALID_NODE_ID;\n   992→\n   993→    for (let i = path.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {\n   994→      const entry = path[i];\n   995→      if (entry === undefined) continue;\n   996→\n   997→      const clonedId = this.cloneNode(entry.nodeId);\n   998→\n   999→      // Update child pointer if we cloned a child\n  1000→      if (prevClonedId !== INVALID_NODE_ID && this.arena.isInternal(clonedId)) {\n  1001→        const children = this.arena.getChildren(clonedId);\n  1002→        children[entry.indexInNode] = prevClonedId;\n  1003→        this.arena.setChildren(clonedId, children);\n  1004→      }\n  1005→\n  1006→      clonedPath.unshift({ nodeId: clonedId, indexInNode: entry.indexInNode });\n  1007→      prevClonedId = clonedId;\n  1008→    }\n  1009→\n  1010→    // Update root if needed\n  1011→    if (clonedPath.length > 0) {\n  1012→      const firstEntry = clonedPath[0];\n  1013→      if (firstEntry !== undefined) {\n  1014→        this._root = firstEntry.nodeId;\n  1015→      }\n  1016→    }\n  1017→\n  1018→    return clonedPath;\n  1019→  }\n  1020→\n  1021→  private cloneNode(nodeId: NodeId): NodeId {\n  1022→    const clonedId = this.arena.clone(nodeId);\n  1023→\n  1024→    // Copy summary\n  1025→    const summary = this.summaries.get(nodeId);\n  1026→    if (summary !== undefined) {\n  1027→      this.summaries.set(clonedId, summary);\n  1028→    }\n  1029→\n  1030→    // Deep copy leaf items if leaf\n  1031→    if (this.arena.isLeaf(nodeId)) {\n  1032→      const data = this.arena.getItem(nodeId);\n  1033→      if (data) {\n  1034→        this.arena.setItem(clonedId, { items: [...data.items] });\n  1035→      }\n  1036→    }\n  1037→\n  1038→    return clonedId;\n  1039→  }\n  1040→\n  1041→  private splitAndPropagate(path: Array<{ nodeId: NodeId; indexInNode: number }>): void {\n  1042→    let i = path.length - 1;\n  1043→\n  1044→    while (i >= 0) {\n  1045→      const entry = path[i];\n  1046→      if (entry === undefined) {\n  1047→        i--;\n  1048→        continue;\n  1049→      }\n  1050→\n  1051→      const nodeId = entry.nodeId;\n  1052→      const count = this.arena.isLeaf(nodeId)\n  1053→        ? this.arena.getCount(nodeId)\n  1054→        : this.arena.getChildren(nodeId).length;\n  1055→\n  1056→      if (count <= this.branchingFactor) {\n  1057→        // No more splits needed, just update summaries\n  1058→        this.updateSummary(nodeId);\n  1059→        i--;\n  1060→        continue;\n  1061→      }\n  1062→\n  1063→      // Need to split\n  1064→      const [leftId, rightId] = this.splitNode(nodeId);\n  1065→\n  1066→      if (i === 0) {\n  1067→        // Splitting root - create new root\n  1068→        this._root = this.createInternal([leftId, rightId]);\n  1069→        return;\n  1070→      }\n  1071→\n  1072→      // Insert right node into parent\n  1073→      const parentEntry = path[i - 1];\n  1074→      if (parentEntry === undefined) {\n  1075→        i--;\n  1076→        continue;\n  1077→      }\n  1078→\n  1079→      const parentChildren = this.arena.getChildren(parentEntry.nodeId);\n  1080→      parentChildren[parentEntry.indexInNode] = leftId;\n  1081→      parentChildren.splice(parentEntry.indexInNode + 1, 0, rightId);\n  1082→      this.arena.setChildren(parentEntry.nodeId, parentChildren);\n  1083→\n  1084→      i--;\n  1085→    }\n  1086→\n  1087→    this.updateSummariesUp(path);\n  1088→  }\n  1089→\n  1090→  private splitNode(nodeId: NodeId): [NodeId, NodeId] {\n  1091→    const mid = Math.floor(this.branchingFactor / 2);\n  1092→\n  1093→    if (this.arena.isLeaf(nodeId)) {\n  1094→      const data = this.arena.getItem(nodeId);\n  1095→      const items = data?.items ?? [];\n  1096→\n  1097→      const leftItems = items.slice(0, mid);\n  1098→      const rightItems = items.slice(mid);\n  1099→\n  1100→      const leftId = this.createLeaf(leftItems);\n  1101→      const rightId = this.createLeaf(rightItems);\n  1102→\n  1103→      return [leftId, rightId];\n  1104→    }\n  1105→\n  1106→    const children = this.arena.getChildren(nodeId);\n  1107→    const leftChildren = children.slice(0, mid);\n  1108→    const rightChildren = children.slice(mid);\n  1109→\n  1110→    const leftId = this.createInternal(leftChildren);\n  1111→    const rightId = this.createInternal(rightChildren);\n  1112→\n  1113→    return [leftId, rightId];\n  1114→  }\n  1115→\n  1116→  private mergeOrRedistribute(path: Array<{ nodeId: NodeId; indexInNode: number }>): void {\n  1117→    const minItems = Math.floor(this.branchingFactor / 2);\n  1118→\n  1119→    for (let i = path.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {\n  1120→      const entry = path[i];\n  1121→      if (entry === undefined) continue;\n  1122→\n  1123→      const nodeId = entry.nodeId;\n  1124→      const count = this.arena.isLeaf(nodeId)\n  1125→        ? this.arena.getCount(nodeId)\n  1126→        : this.arena.getChildren(nodeId).length;\n  1127→\n  1128→      // Root can have any number of children (down to 0)\n  1129→      if (i === 0) {\n  1130→        // If root is internal with single child, make child the new root\n  1131→        if (this.arena.isInternal(nodeId) && count === 1) {\n  1132→          const children = this.arena.getChildren(nodeId);\n  1133→          const onlyChild = children[0];\n  1134→          if (onlyChild !== undefined) {\n  1135→            this._root = onlyChild;\n  1136→          }\n  1137→        }\n  1138→        this.updateSummary(nodeId);\n  1139→        continue;\n  1140→      }\n  1141→\n  1142→      if (count >= minItems) {\n  1143→        this.updateSummary(nodeId);\n  1144→        continue;\n  1145→      }\n  1146→\n  1147→      // Need to merge or redistribute\n  1148→      const parentEntry = path[i - 1];\n  1149→      if (parentEntry === undefined) continue;\n  1150→\n  1151→      const parentChildren = this.arena.getChildren(parentEntry.nodeId);\n  1152→      const siblingIndex =\n  1153→        parentEntry.indexInNode > 0 ? parentEntry.indexInNode - 1 : parentEntry.indexInNode + 1;\n  1154→\n  1155→      const siblingId = parentChildren[siblingIndex];\n  1156→      if (siblingId === undefined) {\n  1157→        this.updateSummary(nodeId);\n  1158→        continue;\n  1159→      }\n  1160→\n  1161→      const siblingCount = this.arena.isLeaf(siblingId)\n  1162→        ? this.arena.getCount(siblingId)\n  1163→        : this.arena.getChildren(siblingId).length;\n  1164→\n  1165→      if (count + siblingCount <= this.branchingFactor) {\n  1166→        // Merge\n  1167→        this.mergeNodes(path, i, siblingIndex);\n  1168→      } else {\n  1169→        // Redistribute\n  1170→        this.redistributeNodes(nodeId, siblingId, siblingIndex < parentEntry.indexInNode);\n  1171→        this.updateSummary(nodeId);\n  1172→        this.updateSummary(siblingId);\n  1173→      }\n  1174→    }\n  1175→  }\n  1176→\n  1177→  private mergeNodes(\n  1178→    path: Array<{ nodeId: NodeId; indexInNode: number }>,\n  1179→    nodeIndex: number,\n  1180→    siblingIndex: number,\n  1181→  ): void {\n  1182→    const entry = path[nodeIndex];\n  1183→    const parentEntry = path[nodeIndex - 1];\n  1184→    if (entry === undefined || parentEntry === undefined) return;\n  1185→\n  1186→    const nodeId = entry.nodeId;\n  1187→    const parentChildren = this.arena.getChildren(parentEntry.nodeId);\n  1188→    const siblingId = parentChildren[siblingIndex];\n  1189→    if (siblingId === undefined) return;\n  1190→\n  1191→    // Determine left and right\n  1192→    const [leftId, rightId] =\n  1193→      siblingIndex < parentEntry.indexInNode ? [siblingId, nodeId] : [nodeId, siblingId];\n  1194→\n  1195→    if (this.arena.isLeaf(leftId)) {\n  1196→      // Merge leaf items\n  1197→      const leftData = this.arena.getItem(leftId);\n  1198→      const rightData = this.arena.getItem(rightId);\n  1199→      const mergedItems = [...(leftData?.items ?? []), ...(rightData?.items ?? [])];\n  1200→      this.arena.setItem(leftId, { items: mergedItems });\n  1201→      this.arena.setCount(leftId, mergedItems.length);\n  1202→    } else {\n  1203→      // Merge internal children\n  1204→      const leftChildren = this.arena.getChildren(leftId);\n  1205→      const rightChildren = this.arena.getChildren(rightId);\n  1206→      this.arena.setChildren(leftId, [...leftChildren, ...rightChildren]);\n  1207→    }\n  1208→\n  1209→    this.updateSummary(leftId);\n  1210→\n  1211→    // Remove the right node from parent\n  1212→    const removeIndex =\n  1213→      siblingIndex < parentEntry.indexInNode ? parentEntry.indexInNode : siblingIndex;\n  1214→    parentChildren.splice(removeIndex, 1);\n  1215→    this.arena.setChildren(parentEntry.nodeId, parentChildren);\n  1216→\n  1217→    // Update path entry if we merged into sibling\n  1218→    if (siblingIndex < parentEntry.indexInNode) {\n  1219→      entry.nodeId = leftId;\n  1220→      entry.indexInNode = siblingIndex;\n  1221→    }\n  1222→  }\n  1223→\n  1224→  private redistributeNodes(nodeId: NodeId, siblingId: NodeId, siblingIsLeft: boolean): void {\n  1225→    if (this.arena.isLeaf(nodeId)) {\n  1226→      const nodeData = this.arena.getItem(nodeId);\n  1227→      const siblingData = this.arena.getItem(siblingId);\n  1228→      const nodeItems = nodeData?.items ?? [];\n  1229→      const siblingItems = siblingData?.items ?? [];\n  1230→\n  1231→      const total = [...siblingItems, ...nodeItems];\n  1232→      if (!siblingIsLeft) {\n  1233→        total.reverse();\n  1234→      }\n  1235→\n  1236→      const mid = Math.floor(total.length / 2);\n  1237→      const leftItems = total.slice(0, mid);\n  1238→      const rightItems = total.slice(mid);\n  1239→\n  1240→      if (siblingIsLeft) {\n  1241→        this.arena.setItem(siblingId, { items: leftItems });\n  1242→        this.arena.setCount(siblingId, leftItems.length);\n  1243→        this.arena.setItem(nodeId, { items: rightItems });\n  1244→        this.arena.setCount(nodeId, rightItems.length);\n  1245→      } else {\n  1246→        this.arena.setItem(nodeId, { items: leftItems });\n  1247→        this.arena.setCount(nodeId, leftItems.length);\n  1248→        this.arena.setItem(siblingId, { items: rightItems });\n  1249→        this.arena.setCount(siblingId, rightItems.length);\n  1250→      }\n  1251→    } else {\n  1252→      const nodeChildren = this.arena.getChildren(nodeId);\n  1253→      const siblingChildren = this.arena.getChildren(siblingId);\n  1254→\n  1255→      const total = siblingIsLeft\n  1256→        ? [...siblingChildren, ...nodeChildren]\n  1257→        : [...nodeChildren, ...siblingChildren];\n  1258→\n  1259→      const mid = Math.floor(total.length / 2);\n  1260→\n  1261→      if (siblingIsLeft) {\n  1262→        this.arena.setChildren(siblingId, total.slice(0, mid));\n  1263→        this.arena.setChildren(nodeId, total.slice(mid));\n  1264→      } else {\n  1265→        this.arena.setChildren(nodeId, total.slice(0, mid));\n  1266→        this.arena.setChildren(siblingId, total.slice(mid));\n  1267→      }\n  1268→    }\n  1269→  }\n  1270→\n  1271→  private updateSummariesUp(path: Array<{ nodeId: NodeId; indexInNode: number }>): void {\n  1272→    for (let i = path.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {\n  1273→      const entry = path[i];\n  1274→      if (entry === undefined) continue;\n  1275→      this.updateSummary(entry.nodeId);\n  1276→    }\n  1277→  }\n  1278→\n  1279→  private updateSummary(nodeId: NodeId): void {\n  1280→    let summary = this.summaryOps.identity();\n  1281→\n  1282→    if (this.arena.isLeaf(nodeId)) {\n  1283→      const data = this.arena.getItem(nodeId);\n  1284→      if (data) {\n  1285→        for (const item of data.items) {\n  1286→          summary = this.summaryOps.combine(summary, item.summary());\n  1287→        }\n  1288→      }\n  1289→    } else {\n  1290→      const children = this.arena.getChildren(nodeId);\n  1291→      for (const childId of children) {\n  1292→        const childSummary = this.summaries.get(childId);\n  1293→        if (childSummary !== undefined) {\n  1294→          summary = this.summaryOps.combine(summary, childSummary);\n  1295→        }\n  1296→      }\n  1297→    }\n  1298→\n  1299→    this.summaries.set(nodeId, summary);\n  1300→  }\n  1301→\n  1302→  private buildFromLeaves(leaves: NodeId[]): NodeId {\n  1303→    if (leaves.length === 0) {\n  1304→      return this.createLeaf([]);\n  1305→    }\n  1306→\n  1307→    if (leaves.length === 1) {\n  1308→      const leaf = leaves[0];\n  1309→      return leaf !== undefined ? leaf : this.createLeaf([]);\n  1310→    }\n  1311→\n  1312→    // Build internal nodes level by level\n  1313→    let currentLevel = leaves;\n  1314→    const minChildren = Math.floor(this.branchingFactor / 2);\n  1315→\n  1316→    while (currentLevel.length > 1) {\n  1317→      const nextLevel: NodeId[] = [];\n  1318→      let i = 0;\n  1319→\n  1320→      while (i < currentLevel.length) {\n  1321→        const remaining = currentLevel.length - i;\n  1322→\n  1323→        // If remaining nodes would result in an underflow node at the end,\n  1324→        // split more evenly\n  1325→        if (remaining <= this.branchingFactor) {\n  1326→          // Take all remaining\n  1327→          const chunk = currentLevel.slice(i);\n  1328→          const internalId = this.createInternal(chunk);\n  1329→          nextLevel.push(internalId);\n  1330→          break;\n  1331→        }\n  1332→\n  1333→        if (remaining < this.branchingFactor + minChildren && remaining > this.branchingFactor) {\n  1334→          // Would leave fewer than minChildren for last node\n  1335→          // Split remaining evenly between two nodes\n  1336→          const mid = Math.ceil(remaining / 2);\n  1337→          const chunk1 = currentLevel.slice(i, i + mid);\n  1338→          const chunk2 = currentLevel.slice(i + mid);\n  1339→          nextLevel.push(this.createInternal(chunk1));\n  1340→          nextLevel.push(this.createInternal(chunk2));\n  1341→          break;\n  1342→        }\n  1343→\n  1344→        // Normal case: take a full chunk\n  1345→        const chunk = currentLevel.slice(i, i + this.branchingFactor);\n  1346→        const internalId = this.createInternal(chunk);\n  1347→        nextLevel.push(internalId);\n  1348→        i += this.branchingFactor;\n  1349→      }\n  1350→\n  1351→      currentLevel = nextLevel;\n  1352→    }\n  1353→\n  1354→    const root = currentLevel[0];\n  1355→    return root !== undefined ? root : this.createLeaf([]);\n  1356→  }\n  1357→\n  1358→  private collectLeafDepths(nodeId: NodeId, depth: number, depths: Set<number>): void {\n  1359→    if (this.arena.isLeaf(nodeId)) {\n  1360→      depths.add(depth);\n  1361→      return;\n  1362→    }\n  1363→\n  1364→    const children = this.arena.getChildren(nodeId);\n  1365→ string[]): void {\n  1371→    const storedSummary = this.summaries.get(nodeId);\n  1372→\n  1373→    let computedSummary = this.summaryOps.identity();\n  1374→    if (this.arena.isLeaf(nodeId)) {\n  1375→      const data = this.arena.getItem(nodeId);\n  1376→      if (data) {\n  1377→        for (const item of data.items) {\n  1378→          computedSummary = 1400→    const minItems = isRoot ? 0 : Math.floor(this.branchingFactor / 2);\n  1401→    const maxItems = this.branchingFactor;\n  1402→\n  1403→    if (this.arena.isLeaf(nodeId)) {\n  1404→      const count = this.arena.getCount(nodeId);\n  1405→      if (!isRoot && count < minItems) {\n  1406→        errors.push(`Leaf ${nodeId} has ${count} items, minimum is ${minItems}`);\n  1407→      }\n  1408→      if (count > maxItems) {\n  1409→        errors.push(`Leaf ${nodeId} has ${count} items, maximum is ${maxItems}`);\n  1410→      }\n  1411→    } else {\n  1412→      const children = 1435→ */\n  1436→export interface CountSummary {\n  1437→  count: number;\n  1438→}\n  1439→\n  1440→export const countSummaryOps: Summary<CountSummary> = {\n  1441→  identity(): CountSummary {\n  1442→    return { count: 0 };\n  1443→  },\n  1444→  combine(left: CountSummary, right: CountSummary): CountSummary {\n  1445→    return { count: left.count + right.count };\n  1446→  },\n  1447→};\n  1448→\n  1449→/**\n  1450→ * Dimension for seeking by item count.\n  1451→ */\n  1452→export const countDimension: Dimension<CountSummary, number> = {\n  1453→  measure(summary: CountSummary): number
